title: Crafted Explorers! Cobblemon
description: A fun ever changing modpack for me and some friends currently based around cobblemon, if you want to join please jump aboard!
body:
Crafted Explorers is a modpack thats ever changing by the season, currently its centered around cobblemon with lots of fun mods to play with along the journey!

Theres lots for you to do, more blocks, armor, tools and many biomes to explore! there is also a server up where you can join and play with others.


This modpack changes often depending on what season the server is going through so please be aware that its based around the server. mods may also be added or removed based on suggestions by server members.
